page_metadata.biotools__summary: A framework for scientific data management, exploration, integration and analysis. It is adaptable to many types of scientific data and data workflows, and there are several pre-configured MOLGENIS systems for specific data types.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A framework for scientific data management, exploration, integration and analysis. It is adaptable to many types of scientific data and data workflows, and there are several pre-configured MOLGENIS systems for specific data types.
